items.title: Research Intern — DGPA UNAM
items.description: Curated documents for integration into custom GPTs and Gemini Gems. Using Marker and PDF Sandwich, I applied OCR to convert books and articles into Markdown format, and also generated automatic YouTube video transcriptions with yt-dlp and Whisper.

items.title: Marketing Lead — SIAFI-UNAM
items.description: Coordinated the marketing team for the production and publication of social media content. Implemented collaborative processes, asset standardization, and a ticketing system using Canva, Notion, and Google Workspace.
